Judul_Pekerjaan: Unity WebGL Game Developer (TikTok Mini Game)
Kualifikasi_Persyaratan: Remote/Dari rumah | 1 - 3 tahun pengalaman | Minimal Diploma (D1 - D4)
Deskripsi_Pekerjaan:
Deskripsi pekerjaan Unity WebGL Game Developer (TikTok Mini Game) FMTPLA
We’re looking for a Unity developer to build a lightweight WebGL game designed for TikTok.
This is not a traditional mobile app.
No App Store / Google Play release, no heavy backend, no complex systems.
The goal is simple:
👉 Build a fast, addictive, hyper-casual game that runs smoothly in a WebGL environment and fits TikTok usage (short sessions, instant play, high retention).
⸻
Scope
Develop a Unity-based WebGL game
Optimize for performance, low build size, and mobile browsers
Implement simple game mechanics (arcade / puzzle / reaction-based)
Ensure smooth touch controls and responsiveness
Integrate basic SDK elements if needed (TikTok environment)
⸻
What we don’t need
No App Store submission
No complex UI systems
No heavy multiplayer/backend
No overengineering
If you tend to overbuild → this is not for you.
⸻
What we’re looking for
Strong experience with Unity + WebGL builds
Ability to create simple but highly engaging gameplay loops
Good understanding of mobile performance constraints
Fast execution and iteration mindset
⸻
Project type
Full-time
Immediate start
Potential for long-term collaboration if it performs
⸻
How to apply
Mandatory:
Send your portfolio of games (live links preferred).
If you don’t have playable examples → don’t apply

Kualifikasi_Persyaratan: Mobile Track Record: At least 2+ years of experience specifically developing and deploying games for iOS and Android. | Tech Stack: Proficiency in C# and Unity, with specific experience in URP (Universal Render Pipeline) for mobile performance. | Input Systems: Experience with Unity’s Input System package for touch gestures and multi-touch functionality. | Portfolio: Mandatory. Must show mobile-specific projects. Bonus points for links to live games on the App Store or Google Play. | Optimization Skills: Knowledge of Draw Call Batching, Occlusion Culling, and Shader optimization for mobile GPUs. | Project Details | Type: Project-Based. | Location: Hybrid. | Duration: +/- 3 months.
Deskripsi_Pekerjaan:
We are looking for a Unity Game Developer with a focus on Mobile Platforms (iOS/Android) for a high-priority project.
This is a project-based role for a developer who understands that mobile development isn’t just about "shrinking" a PC game—it’s about performance, accessibility, and intuitive touch gameplay.
Mobile Gameplay: Implement responsive touch-based controls and mobile-friendly UI/UX.
Optimization: Use the Unity Profiler to identify and fix bottlenecks in CPU, GPU, and memory usage to maintain a high FPS.
Asset Management: Efficiently manage texture compression, draw calls, and build sizes for App Store and Google Play requirements.
System Integration: Handle mobile-specific features such as push notifications, in-app purchases, or ad SDKs if required.

Lokasi: Jl. Bukit Cemara Indah No.46, Mekarsaluyu, Kec. Cimenyan, Kabupaten Bandung, Jawa Barat 40198
Skills: Game Design | 3D Modeling | Game Development | Roblox Studio | Lua
Benefit_Pekerjaan: THR | BPJS Kesehatan | Transport Money | BPJS Tenaga Kerja
Kualifikasi_Persyaratan: Wajib Domisili Bandung (Bersedia bekerja dari kantor/WFO). | Menguasai Roblox Studio secara mendalam. | Hybrid Skill: Memiliki kemampuan kuat di Building (Desain Visual) dan Scripting (Luau). | Nilai plus jika menguasai Blender (untuk Mesh/3D Modeling). | Mampu bekerja mandiri (Solo Dev) dan disiplin dengan deadline. | ⚠️Catatan Penting untuk Pelamar: | Mohon sertakan LINK GAME atau PORTOFOLIO Roblox yang pernah kamu buat di dalam CV atau profil kamu. Lamaran tanpa contoh game yang bisa dimainkan tidak akan diproses.
Deskripsi_Pekerjaan:
Kami mencari Roblox Game Developer berbakat yang menguasai Building & Scripting sekaligus untuk bergabung dengan tim kami secara Full-time (WFO) di Bandung. Kamu akan bertanggung jawab penuh dalam menciptakan dunia game yang imersif dan fungsional.
Merancang dan membangun Map/Environment yang detail, estetik, dan rapi di Roblox Studio.
Menulis script (Luau) untuk mekanik game, UI/UX, sistem data (DataStore), dan interaksi pemain.
Melakukan optimasi aset dan script agar game berjalan lancar (anti-lag) di berbagai perangkat.
Bekerja sama dengan manajemen untuk merealisasikan konsep game menjadi produk jadi.
